title: eriophorum lineatum
intro: Eriophorum lineatum, also known as the cotton-grass or thread-leaved cotton-grass, is a perennial plant species belonging to the family Cyperaceae. It is native to North America, particularly in wetlands and bogs. The medicinal properties of Eriophorum lineatum lie in its roots, which contain saponins that have anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The plant can be used to prepare herbal remedies, such as infusions and tinctures, which may provide health benefits including soothing digestive issues and supporting immune function.
